name: Exploration Events Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.50
description: Table for determining exploration task outcomes and discoveries

1-15.narrative: Despite thorough searching, you find nothing of value in the area

16-25.narrative: You discover some minor salvageable materials

26-35.narrative: A thorough search reveals valuable scrap and components

36-45.description: Found 3 credits worth of valuable items
36-45.narrative: Your exploration uncovers a cache of valuable materials

46-55.narrative: You discover useful equipment abandoned or overlooked by others

56-65.narrative: Your search turns up functional gear that could prove useful

66-75.description: Learned a rumor about work opportunities
66-75.narrative: Local contacts share information about potential opportunities

76-80.description: Made contact with a potential patron
76-80.narrative: Your exploration leads to contact with someone who might have work

81-85.description: Found a rare or valuable item
81-85.narrative: Exceptional luck leads to the discovery of something truly valuable

86-90.description: Gained 1 Story Point from interesting discovery
86-90.narrative: Your exploration uncovers something that could prove significant later

91-95.narrative: The exploring character has a meaningful encounter during their search

96-98.narrative: Your exploration attracts unwanted attention or reveals hidden dangers

99-100.description: Major discovery worth 5 credits and 1 Story Point
99-100.narrative: An exceptional discovery that could change everything

SAVVY.description: Savvy characters are better at spotting opportunities

FRONTIER.description: Frontier worlds have more undiscovered opportunities

CIVILIZED.description: Well-explored civilized worlds offer fewer discoveries

CORPORATE.description: Corporate worlds are thoroughly monitored and searched

survey_tools.description: Professional survey equipment greatly aids exploration

multiple_explorers.rule: Each additional explorer beyond the first adds +5 to the roll
multiple_explorers.description: Multiple explorers can cover more ground effectively

dangerous_results.rule: Results 96-98 require immediate combat or skill resolution
dangerous_results.description: Some exploration results involve immediate danger

follow_up_opportunities.rule: Rumor and patron contact results may provide benefits in future turns
follow_up_opportunities.description: Information gained through exploration has lasting value
